name: Smile.io Loyalty and Rewards API
what_it_does: Smile.io loyalty and rewards REST API for e-commerce brands to create and manage points-based loyalty programs, VIP tiers, and referral programs with Shopify, BigCommerce, and Wix integration for customer retention automation. Enables AI agents to manage loyalty program configuration and point earning rules for loyalty automation, handle customer point balance and transaction management for rewards lifecycle automation, access VIP tier management and qualification tracking for customer loyalty tier automation, retrieve referral program creation and tracking for customer acquisition automation, manage reward redemption and coupon code generation for incentive automation, handle customer segment creation based on loyalty status for targeted marketing automation, access program analytics and loyalty ROI reporting for business intelligence automation, retrieve loyalty event tracking and earning history for customer engagement automation, manage Smile.io widget and display configuration for storefront integration automation, and integrate Smile.io with Shopify, Klaviyo, Yotpo, and marketing platforms for end-to-end loyalty ecosystem automation.
use_cases: Managing customer points from loyalty program automation agents
Tracking VIP tier status from customer retention agents
Generating referral links from customer acquisition agents
Issuing reward coupons from incentive automation agents
not_for: Enterprise multi-brand loyalty programs (use Antavo or Annex Cloud for enterprise)
Coalition loyalty programs across multiple merchants
B2B loyalty and channel partner incentives
best_when: An e-commerce brand wanting AI agents to automate loyalty program management, VIP tier tracking, referral program execution, and rewards redemption through Smile.io's SMB-focused loyalty platform.
avoid_when: SHOPIFY INTEGRATION REQUIRES SHOPIFY APP INSTALL: Smile.io's deepest Shopify integration requires Smile.io Shopify app installed; API-only access has reduced Shopify checkout and order integration; automated loyalty program using API-only without app install misses automatic point earning on purchase events. POINT EXPIRY AUTOMATION REQUIRES PLAN SUPPORT: Smile.io point expiry rules (points expire after X months) are available on higher plans; automated loyalty program design that includes expiry for engagement must verify plan supports expiry configuration; automated expiry configuration on non-supporting plan creates feature unavailable error. REFERRAL PROGRAM FRAUD DETECTION FOR AUTOMATED REFERRALS: Smile.io referral program is susceptible to fraudulent self-referral; automated referral tracking must implement fraud detection in parallel with Smile.io tracking; automated referral reward issuance without fraud review creates incentive for customer self-referral abuse that inflates acquisition cost.

auth.notes: Smile.io uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Toronto, Canada HQ. Founded 2012 by Chris Lavoie. Backed by OMERS Ventures, Nexus Venture Partners, BDC Capital ($35M+ raised). Products: Points program, VIP tiers, referral program, reward catalog, analytics. Platforms: Shopify, BigCommerce, Wix, Squarespace. GDPR. CASL. Serves 100,000+ e-commerce merchants. Competes with LoyaltyLion, Yotpo Loyalty, and Antavo for SMB e-commerce loyalty.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free Starter plan (up to 200 monthly orders, basic points program, Smile branding)
pricing.notes: Toronto Canada. OMERS/Nexus backed. Free Starter + paid tiers. No credit card for free. GDPR, CASL.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; customer and point queries throttled; webhooks for point earn, redeem, tier change, and referral events

known_agent_gotchas: CUSTOMER ID MUST MATCH E-COMMERCE PLATFORM ID: Smile.io customer records use ID matching the e-commerce platform (Shopify customer ID, BigCommerce customer ID); automated loyalty management must use correct platform customer ID, not Smile.io internal ID; automated point adjustment using wrong customer ID creates point assignment to wrong customer account

POINT EARN RULES ARE RULE-ENGINE BASED — NOT API-TRIGGERED: Smile.io points are earned via configured rule engine (purchase, birthday, review, etc.); automated point earning for custom events must use Smile.io's custom activity API; automated point award for custom events bypassing rule engine creates inconsistent point history that doesn't match program rules in customer-facing widget

REWARD REDEMPTION CREATES DISCOUNT CODE — MUST BE APPLIED: Smile.io reward redemption generates a discount code; automated redemption workflow must deliver discount code to customer for application at checkout; automated redemption without discount code delivery creates redeemed points with no customer benefit — points consumed without reward received

VIP TIER EVALUATION TIMING FOR AUTOMATED TIER MANAGEMENT: Smile.io VIP tier status is calculated based on earning period metrics; tier recalculation may not be real-time after point earning event; automated tier-based segmentation (email to Gold members) should use Smile.io's tier status endpoint rather than calculating tier from points balance

REFERRAL LINK UNIQUENESS PER CUSTOMER: Smile.io generates unique referral link per customer; automated referral program tracking uses customer-specific link as source; automated referral campaign that uses shared link instead of customer-unique links creates referral attribution failure and prevents accurate acquisition source tracking
agent_readiness.security_notes: Loyalty programs. GDPR, CASL. API key. CA/US. Customer loyalty and rewards data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Loyalty platform. GDPR, CASL. API key. CA/US. Customer rewards and referral data.
